name: Kali Linux
tagline: The most advanced penetration testing distribution
description: Kali Linux is the industry-standard distribution for penetration testing, ethical hacking, and digital forensics. Maintained by Offensive Security, it ships with over 600 pre-installed security tools including Metasploit, Burp Suite, Wireshark, and Nmap. It is not intended as a general-purpose desktop OS — its tools assume you know how to use them responsibly. Most professionals run it in a VM or dual-boot alongside another distro.
